California Treasurers Calls on Lynch to Immediately Set DA

emails.body: RE: California Treasurers Calls on Lynch to Immediately Set DA Suspension Date Back to July 1 Jeff, In what time frame are these decisions looking at being made? keep me posted on the July 1st roll back since it would have the biggest implications for EWS/EES existing positions. Thank you, Jeff Richter
